name: TOPYS - 你的灵感库
description:
【编辑精选】
10万+篇编辑精选文章，海量创意视频，涵盖创意、设计、艺术、文案、广告、品牌、建筑等领域，为你搜罗全球尖端优秀创意案例，汲取新鲜灵感；每日最新推荐，让你快速了解全球创意圈热点动态。

【独家专栏】
数十个原创专栏，包含行业观察、艺文探店、商业洞察、案例分析、人物专访、国际创意盛事前线报道，为你提供不同视角的优质内容。

【建立属于自己的灵感库】
你可以把喜欢的文章和或创意内容收藏到自己的灵感库中，同时可以自定义灵感库的分类和名称，更方便地积累和整理灵感。通勤的碎片时间，就可以完成脑爆、提案时的预习收集。

【TOPYS创意学院】
TOPYS邀请国内外专业创意人、创意大师共同打造的一系列线上/线下创意课程产品，为想入门创意行业的爱好者、有兴趣进阶学习的创意从业者提供知识学习通道，多维度启发创意思维。

【 Minds Pro年度会员(连续包年)套餐说明】
订阅周期：1年（连续包年产品）
订阅价格：连续包年产品为每年258元
付款：用户确认购买并付款后记入iTunes账户
续订：苹果iTunes账户会在订阅到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅顺延一个周期
取消续订：如需取消续

name: Wabi
description:
Wabi is the first platform for personal software — where anyone can create, discover, remix, and share mini-apps - no code, no publishing, no limits.

For 50 years, software was made for people.

name: Dropcall: AI Voicemail & Phone
description: Dropcall AI Call is your personal AI phone assistant that talks, listens, and handles calls for you - like a real AI receptionist. Whether you’re busy, unavailable, or just want help managing your calls, Dropcall lets you talk to AI that gets things done.

name: mymind – Extend your mind
description: mymind isn't another productivity app. It's a quiet, private garden for the things you care most about.

name: Soda: Make New Friends
description: Soda is the safest and easiest place to make new friends from all around the world! Just open the app, start chatting, and discover your next potential bsf.

name: Eversend - the money app
description: Eversend is your go to app, offering you a full range of financial services, straight from your mobile phone. Unlike banks, we don’t have hidden fees, inconvenient operating hours and inflexible support.

name: Sona Insight: Voice to Text AI
description: Conversations In. Insights Out.

name: Amie - Todos, calendar
description:
The joyful productivity app.
Schedule time for todos, events, and contacts.

name: Bounty: Make Content, Get Paid
description:
Bounty helps creators turn content into earnings.

Discover active bounties from brands, review the creative brief, and see exactly what you need to make.

name: Sugar - chat beyond the bubble
description:
Why are our messages with friends constrained to generic green and blue chat bubbles? 

It’s time to add some color (and chaos) to your conversations with Sugar.

name: Mate - Curated Social Circle
description:
We believe the best moments happen offline, in real life.
We make a strict filter so every person you meet is worth your time.

name: Picky AI
description:
Stop staring at your camera roll wondering which photo to post.
You took the pics.

name: Yukee simple todo list tracker
description:
**Yukee –  a beautiful minimalist to-do app for humans..**

Yukee is a simple but powerful to-do app that focus on the user experience.
